Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class ConditionalQuant

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.DecomposedQuant
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.Decomp2PhaseQuant
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.ConditionalQuant
public class ConditionalQuant extends Decomp2PhaseQuant

  • Constructor Details

    • ConditionalQuant

      public ConditionalQuant(FormulaFactory ff)

  • Method Details

    • condSubstitute

      public Expression condSubstitute(Expression expr)
      Implements the * operator. See documentation.
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to be *ed
      Returns:
      The substitute for expr

    • push

      public Expression push(Expression expr)
      Description copied from class: Decomp2PhaseQuant
      In the recording phase (phase one) nothing is done, since exact offset is not yet nown. In the second phase the externally bound identifiers are shifted.
      Overrides:
      push in class Decomp2PhaseQuant
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to be pushed
      Returns:
      a new expression with shifted bound identifiers (if in phase 2).

    • conditionalQuantify

      public Predicate conditionalQuantify(int tag, Predicate pred, Translator translator)
      Conditionally generates a new quantified predicate
      Parameters:
      tag - either Formula.EXISTS or Formula.FORALL
      pred - the quantified predicate
      translator - if present is used to translate the bindings.
      Returns:
      a new quantified predicate

    • startPhase2

      public void startPhase2()
      Description copied from class: Decomp2PhaseQuant
      Starts the second phase of the quantification generation. In this phase, the total amount of quantifiers is known from the beginning. And externaly bound identifiers can be shifted properly.
      Overrides:
      startPhase2 in class Decomp2PhaseQuant
